acceptance_criteria: Full drag, Shift, Cmd, and scope-selection proof across the required Orders surfaces on staging.

assertions.label: Queue Shift-range forms a two-cell selection
assertions.expected: Queue selection summary reports 2 selected cells after Shift-range selection.

assertions.label: Queue Cmd-click adds a discontiguous range
assertions.expected: Queue selection summary reports a discontiguous selection after Cmd-click.
assertions.observed: 3 selected cells · 3 rows in scope · discontiguous selection

assertions.label: Queue Cmd+A selects the current grid scope
assertions.expected: Queue selection summary reports more than 2 selected cells and more than 1 row after Cmd+A.

assertions.label: Document Shift-range forms a two-cell selection
assertions.expected: Document selection summary reports 2 selected cells after Shift-range selection.

assertions.label: No AG Grid license warnings were recorded
assertions.expected: No license warnings are emitted during the selection probe.

assertions.label: No page errors were recorded
assertions.expected: No page errors are emitted during the selection probe.

summary.queue_selection_summary_after_discontigu: 3 selected cells · 3 rows in scope · discontiguous selection
